category_sources: source_facts.description says demumble is a symbol demangler; official README describes demangling Itanium, Visual Studio, D, Rust, and Swift symbols.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is demumble; official GitHub README title is demumble.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents usage examples, features, downloads, and build instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify symbol demangling and c++filt/undname-style debugging use cases.
